actions.name: add_video_tags
actions.description: Add one or more tags to a Vimeo video.

tags.description: Tag names to add to the Vimeo video.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding tags to a Vimeo video.

tag.description: The tag value returned by Vimeo when present.

canonical.description: The canonical tag value returned by Vimeo when present.

items.description: A Vimeo tag object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: A Vimeo tag list response.

actions.name: add_video_to_folder
actions.description: Add a Vimeo video to a folder.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding a Vimeo video to a folder.

added.description: Whether the connector completed the Vimeo add request.

anyOf.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo folder video mutation result.

actions.name: add_video_to_showcase
actions.description: Add a Vimeo video to a showcase.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding a Vimeo video to a showcase.

added.description: Whether the connector completed the Vimeo add request.

anyOf.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo showcase video mutation result.

actions.name: create_folder
actions.description: Create a Vimeo folder for the authenticated user or a specified Vimeo user.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

parentFolderUri.description: The Vimeo folder URI, for example `/users/12345/folders/6789`.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Vimeo folder.

uri.description: The Vimeo API URI for the folder.

folder.description: A Vimeo folder object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo folder creation response.

actions.name: delete_folder
actions.description: Delete a Vimeo folder, optionally deleting the videos inside it.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

shouldDeleteVideos.description: Whether Vimeo should also delete videos in the folder.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Vimeo folder.

deleted.description: Whether the connector completed the Vimeo delete request.

anyOf.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo folder deletion result.

actions.name: delete_video
actions.description: Delete a Vimeo video by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Vimeo video.

deleted.description: Whether the connector completed the Vimeo delete request.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo video deletion result.

actions.name: delete_video_tag
actions.description: Remove a tag from a Vimeo video.

tag.description: The tag word to remove from the Vimeo video.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Vimeo video tag.

deleted.description: Whether the connector completed the Vimeo delete request.

tag.description: The tag word removed from the Vimeo video.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo tag deletion result.

actions.name: download_video_file
actions.description: Download one Vimeo video file link and store it in local transit storage.

quality.description: Select a Vimeo download link with this quality label.

type.description: Select a Vimeo download link with this type or MIME type.

fileName.description: The filename to use for the transit file.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for downloading a Vimeo video file into transit storage.

sourceUrl.description: The Vimeo download URL that the connector fetched.

fileId.description: The transit file identifier returned by POST /api/files.

name.description: Optional filename override to send to the provider.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type override to send to the provider.

file.description: The local transit file created for the downloaded video.

outputSchema.description: A Vimeo video file downloaded into local transit storage.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the authenticated Vimeo user profile.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting the authenticated Vimeo user.

uri.description: The Vimeo API URI for the user.

name.description: The display name of the Vimeo user.

user.description: A Vimeo user object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The authenticated Vimeo user profile.

actions.name: get_folder
actions.description: Get metadata for a Vimeo folder.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Vimeo folder.

uri.description: The Vimeo API URI for the folder.

folder.description: A Vimeo folder object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo folder metadata response.

actions.name: get_showcase
actions.description: Get metadata for a specific Vimeo showcase.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Vimeo showcase.

showcase.description: A Vimeo showcase object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo showcase metadata response.

actions.name: get_video
actions.description: Get metadata for a specific Vimeo video.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Vimeo video.

video.description: A Vimeo video object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo video metadata response.

actions.name: get_video_download_links
actions.description: Get temporary downloadable file links for a Vimeo video when Vimeo exposes them.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting Vimeo video download links.

link.description: The temporary Vimeo file download URL.

quality.description: The Vimeo quality label for the downloadable file.

type.description: The MIME type or file type returned by Vimeo.

size.description: The file size in bytes reported by Vimeo.

expires.description: When the temporary download URL expires.

downloadLinks.description: The downloadable file links returned by Vimeo.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo video download links response.

actions.name: list_folder_videos
actions.description: List videos in a Vimeo folder.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

query.description: Search query used to filter videos in the folder.

sort.description: The way to sort the folder video results.

direction.description: The sort direction for folder video results.

includeSubfolders.description: Whether Vimeo should include videos from subfolders.

page.description: The page number of the results to show.

perPage.description: The number of items to show on each page of results, up to a maximum of 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Vimeo folder videos.

items.description: A Vimeo video object returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The current page number returned by Vimeo.
The number of items returned per page by Vimeo.
The total number of items reported by Vimeo.

paging.description: The upstream Vimeo paging object, including next and previous page links.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Vimeo video list response.

actions.name: list_folders
actions.description: List folders that belong to the authenticated user or to a specified Vimeo user.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

query.description: Search query used to filter Vimeo folders.

sort.description: The way to sort the Vimeo folder results.

direction.description: The sort direction for Vimeo folder results.

page.description: The page number of the results to show.

perPage.description: The number of items to show on each page of results, up to a maximum of 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Vimeo folders.

uri.description: The Vimeo API URI for the folder.

items.description: A Vimeo folder object returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The current page number returned by Vimeo.
The number of items returned per page by Vimeo.
The total number of items reported by Vimeo.

paging.description: The upstream Vimeo paging object, including next and previous page links.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Vimeo folder list response.

actions.name: list_showcase_videos
actions.description: List videos in a Vimeo showcase.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

sort.description: The way to sort the Vimeo showcase videos.

direction.description: The sort direction for Vimeo showcase videos.

page.description: The page number of the results to show.

perPage.description: The number of items to show on each page of results, up to a maximum of 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Vimeo showcase videos.

items.description: A Vimeo video object returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The current page number returned by Vimeo.
The number of items returned per page by Vimeo.
The total number of items reported by Vimeo.

paging.description: The upstream Vimeo paging object, including next and previous page links.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Vimeo video list response.

actions.name: list_showcases
actions.description: List showcases that belong to the authenticated user or to a specified Vimeo user.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

query.description: Search query used to filter Vimeo showcases.

sort.description: The way to sort the Vimeo showcase results.

direction.description: The sort direction for Vimeo showcase results.

page.description: The page number of the results to show.

perPage.description: The number of items to show on each page of results, up to a maximum of 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Vimeo showcases.

items.description: A Vimeo showcase object returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The current page number returned by Vimeo.
The number of items returned per page by Vimeo.
The total number of items reported by Vimeo.

paging.description: The upstream Vimeo paging object, including next and previous page links.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Vimeo showcase list response.

actions.name: list_user_videos
actions.description: List videos uploaded by the authenticated user or by a specified Vimeo user.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

query.description: Search query used to filter the user's videos.

sort.description: The way to sort the Vimeo video results.

direction.description: The sort direction for Vimeo video results.

filter.description: The Vimeo video filter to apply.

page.description: The page number of the results to show.

perPage.description: The number of items to show on each page of results, up to a maximum of 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Vimeo user videos.

items.description: A Vimeo video object returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The current page number returned by Vimeo.
The number of items returned per page by Vimeo.
The total number of items reported by Vimeo.

paging.description: The upstream Vimeo paging object, including next and previous page links.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Vimeo video list response.

actions.name: list_video_tags
actions.description: List tags attached to a Vimeo video.

page.description: The page number of the results to show.

perPage.description: The number of items to show on each page of results, up to a maximum of 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Vimeo video tags.

tag.description: The tag value returned by Vimeo when present.

canonical.description: The canonical tag value returned by Vimeo when present.

items.description: A Vimeo tag object returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The current page number returned by Vimeo.
The number of items returned per page by Vimeo.
The total number of items reported by Vimeo.

paging.description: The upstream Vimeo paging object, including next and previous page links.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Vimeo tag list response.

actions.name: remove_video_from_folder
actions.description: Remove a Vimeo video from a folder without deleting the video.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for removing a Vimeo video from a folder.

removed.description: Whether the connector completed the Vimeo remove request.

anyOf.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo folder video removal result.

actions.name: remove_video_from_showcase
actions.description: Remove a Vimeo video from a showcase.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for removing a Vimeo video from a showcase.

removed.description: Whether the connector completed the Vimeo remove request.

anyOf.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo showcase video removal result.

actions.name: replace_video_from_url
actions.description: Add a new version to an existing Vimeo video by asking Vimeo to pull the replacement media from a URL.

sourceUrl.description: The HTTP or HTTPS URL from which Vimeo should pull the replacement video file.

fileName.description: The filename to assign to the new Vimeo video version.

sourceSizeBytes.description: The size in bytes of the replacement video file.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for replacing a Vimeo video by pull URL.

version.description: A Vimeo video version object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo video version response.

actions.name: update_folder
actions.description: Update a Vimeo folder name.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a Vimeo folder.

uri.description: The Vimeo API URI for the folder.

folder.description: A Vimeo folder object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Vimeo folder update response.

actions.name: update_video
actions.description: Update basic metadata for a Vimeo video without uploading or replacing media.

license.description: The Creative Commons license code to apply to the video.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating Vimeo video metadata.

video.description: A Vimeo video object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The updated Vimeo video metadata response.

actions.name: upload_video_from_url
actions.description: Upload a new Vimeo video by asking Vimeo to pull the media from an HTTP or HTTPS URL.

userId.description: The Vimeo user ID. Omit this field to use the authenticated user.

sourceUrl.description: The HTTP or HTTPS URL from which Vimeo should pull the video file. The URL must remain valid for at least 24 hours.

sourceSizeBytes.description: The size in bytes of the source video file.

folderUri.description: The Vimeo folder URI, for example `/users/12345/folders/6789`.

privacyView.description: The Vimeo privacy setting for viewing the uploaded video.

privacyDownload.description: Whether viewers can download the uploaded video when supported.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for uploading a Vimeo video by pull URL.

video.description: A Vimeo video object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The uploaded Vimeo video metadata response.
